message:
🐛 Fix demo mode toggle - allow manual disable (#696)

The previous logic prevented turning off demo mode if it was explicitly enabled,
but this also blocked the manual toggle button. Added userInitiated parameter to
distinguish between automatic state changes (blocked) and user clicks (allowed).

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
